title: Hammerite Direct to Rust Metal Paint - Smooth Cream Finish 250ML & Harris Seriously Good Metalwork Round Paint Brush, 15mm, Grey, 102071000
features: Product 1: Smooth glossy finish for a flawless high sheen
Product 1: Up to 8 years rust protection
Product 1: A 3 in 1 formulation gives beautiful protection for metal
Product 1: Primer, undercoat and topcoat in one
Product 2: Designed, tested and proven to perform better with metal paints than a standard gloss brush.
Product 2: No bristle loss with patented NoLoss technology.
Product 2: Comfort grip handle for ease of use during extended decorating sessions.
Product 2: The round brush gives you more control when painting those awkward areas.
description: Hammerite Direct to Rust Metal Paint - Smooth Cream Finish 250ML Rust - its starts deep inside, gradually eating its way through the metal weakening it, seeping up through the paint; leaving those horrid little bubbles and holes all over your vehicle. There are so many different products on the market to deal with rust, but once it starts you will need a product to not only stop it from getting worse, but to stop it dead. Hammerite may have the answer with their range of Direct to Rust Paints. This Cream Hammerite Direct to Rust metal paint, comes in a 250ml tin and has a smooth finish. Providing up to 8 years protection from the elements, it can be painted straight onto any metal or rusted surface without the need for primer. This tough paint is simple to use and comes with on pack full preparation, usage and cleaning instructions. Perfect for sealing those rust prone areas of bodywork. First developed by Allen Forster in 1962, Hammerite paint was one of the first of its kind, in the world of metal specific paints. After a long period within the industry Hammerite was acquired by ICI, the paints specialists in 1998. Hammerite has consistently worked towards developing their brands and now boasts a wide portfolio of products to cater to all of their customer’s metal painting needs. The range includes their original Hammerite metal paints range, automotive products, Waxoyl the original rust treatment, metal primers and cleaning fluids, to name just a few of the products available. Harris Seriously Good Metalwork Round Paint Brush, 15mm, Grey, 102071000 The Seriously Good Metalwork 15mm Round Brush has been specially designed and engineered to give you a great finish when decorating detailed areas on interior and exterior metalwork, such as radiators, garage doors, gates and railings. For best results rub the brush with a clean hand before use to remove any dust particles. Do not wet. After use with metal paints, remove the excess paint. These paints require specialised cleaners, please refer to the paint tin for further guidance. *Bristle loss may occur if left to soak or in a damp area.
